descriptionText: Sunreef 55 Ultima R2d2 For Sale 2025The Sunreef 55 Ultima R2d2 For Sale 2025 offers a balanced combination of comfort, performance and practicality, making her an appealing option for buyers looking for a modern power yacht in good condition. Delivered in 2025 and lightly used, she has logged only 50 engine hours, giving future owners the reassurance of nearly new machinery with the immediate availability of a completed and ready‑to‑sail vessel. Her overall design focuses on efficient cruising, easy handling and comfortable onboard living for both day trips and extended stays.Powered by 2 × Volvo D8 inboard diesel engines, each producing 800 hp, this Sunreef 55 Ultima provides a confident cruising speed of 25 knots with the ability to reach up to 39 knots when required. The hull design and beam contribute to stability and comfort while underway, making her suitable for various sea conditions. Fuel and water capacities are sized for practical coastal cruising, and her passenger layout accommodates relaxed social outings or private family use.The interior offers a thoughtful layout with two guest cabins, a crew cabin and multiple heads that provide privacy and convenience for everyone onboard. This configuration works well for weekend cruising or longer passages, supported by a range of onboard systems such as air conditioning, heating, a watermaker and household‑style appliances. The saloon and outdoor spaces are arranged to encourage easy movement and comfortable lounging, enhanced by useful extras like cockpit cushions, teak decks and a hydraulic gangway.Navigation and onboard systems are comprehensive, with a full suite of electronics including radar, GPS, autopilot and multiple entertainment features. Handling is simplified with joystick control and a bow thruster, making docking more manageable even for less experienced operators. For those who value functional outdoor space, the cockpit features a table, shower, Bimini top and covers that help protect her surfaces when not in use.Overall, the Sunreef 55 Ultima R2d2 For Sale 2025 presents an appealing package for anyone seeking a well‑kept, recently delivered yacht that is ready to use without requiring upgrades or repairs. She is in good condition, well‑equipped and prepared for her next owner to step aboard and begin cruising.Specifications:• Engines: 2 × Volvo D8 (2025), inboard diesel, 50 hours, 800 hp each • Dimensions: LOA 16.60 m, beam 5.50 m, max draft 0.90 m • Speed: cruising 25 knots, maximum 39 knots • Capacities: fuel 1 × 1,500 L; fresh water 1 × 300 L • Passenger capacity: seating for 6; maximum 12 passengers • Accommodation: 2 guest cabins; 1 crew cabin; 2 guest heads; 1 crew head • Covers: Bimini top; cockpit cover • Electrical equipment: generator; inverter; shore power inlet • Electronics: autopilot; cockpit speakers; compass; DVD player; depthsounder; GPS; log‑speedometer; navigation centre; plotter; radar; radar detector; radio; repeater(s); TV set; VHF • Inside equipment: air conditioning; battery charger; bow thruster; deep freezer; dishwasher; electric bilge pump; electric head; watermaker; heating; hot water; manual bilge pump; microwave; oven; refrigerator; seawater pump; washing machine • Outside equipment/extras: cockpit cushions; cockpit shower; cockpit table; hydraulic gangway; swimming ladder; teak cockpit; teak sidedecks • Additional equipment: joystick control
descriptionHtml:
Sunreef 55 Ultima R2d2 For Sale 2025

The Sunreef 55 Ultima R2d2 For Sale 2025 offers a balanced combination of comfort, performance and practicality, making her an appealing option for buyers looking for a modern power yacht in good condition. Delivered in 2025 and lightly used, she has logged only 50 engine hours, giving future owners the reassurance of nearly new machinery with the immediate availability of a completed and ready‑to‑sail vessel. Her overall design focuses on efficient cruising, easy handling and comfortable onboard living for both day trips and extended stays.

Powered by 2 × Volvo D8 inboard diesel engines, each producing 800 hp, this Sunreef 55 Ultima provides a confident cruising speed of 25 knots with the ability to reach up to 39 knots when required. The hull design and beam contribute to stability and comfort while underway, making her suitable for various sea conditions. Fuel and water capacities are sized for practical coastal cruising, and her passenger layout accommodates relaxed social outings or private family use.

The interior offers a thoughtful layout with two guest cabins, a crew cabin and multiple heads that provide privacy and convenience for everyone onboard. This configuration works well for weekend cruising or longer passages, supported by a range of onboard systems such as air conditioning, heating, a watermaker and household‑style appliances. The saloon and outdoor spaces are arranged to encourage easy movement and comfortable lounging, enhanced by useful extras like cockpit cushions, teak decks and a hydraulic gangway.

Navigation and onboard systems are comprehensive, with a full suite of electronics including radar, GPS, autopilot and multiple entertainment features. Handling is simplified with joystick control and a bow thruster, making docking more manageable even for less experienced operators. For those who value functional outdoor space, the cockpit features a table, shower, Bimini top and covers that help protect her surfaces when not in use.

Overall, the Sunreef 55 Ultima R2d2 For Sale 2025 presents an appealing package for anyone seeking a well‑kept, recently delivered yacht that is ready to use without requiring upgrades or repairs. She is in good condition, well‑equipped and prepared for her next owner to step aboard and begin cruising.

Specifications:

• Engines: 2 × Volvo D8 (2025), inboard diesel, 50 hours, 800 hp each
• Dimensions: LOA 16.60 m, beam 5.50 m, max draft 0.90 m
• Speed: cruising 25 knots, maximum 39 knots
• Capacities: fuel 1 × 1,500 L; fresh water 1 × 300 L
• Passenger capacity: seating for 6; maximum 12 passengers
• Accommodation: 2 guest cabins; 1 crew cabin; 2 guest heads; 1 crew head
• Covers: Bimini top; cockpit cover
• Electrical equipment: generator; inverter; shore power inlet
• Electronics: autopilot; cockpit speakers; compass; DVD player; depthsounder; GPS; log‑speedometer; navigation centre; plotter; radar; radar detector; radio; repeater(s); TV set; VHF
• Inside equipment: air conditioning; battery charger; bow thruster; deep freezer; dishwasher; electric bilge pump; electric head; watermaker; heating; hot water; manual bilge pump; microwave; oven; refrigerator; seawater pump; washing machine
• Outside equipment/extras: cockpit cushions; cockpit shower; cockpit table; hydraulic gangway; swimming ladder; teak cockpit; teak sidedecks
• Additional equipment: joystick control
